rationale: The citing paper uses Draganska et al. (2014) as more than background: it explicitly anchors its framing of the informative-versus-brand-building role of banner ads to that prior work. In the discussion, the authors directly position their contribution against Draganska et al., noting that the earlier study shows brand-building effects but does not examine actual purchase behavior. They then claim to add evidence on cross-campaign brand-building effects for offline purchases and consumer heterogeneity, indicating a clear build-on relationship.
relation_description: The citing study builds on Draganska et al. (2014) by extending prior brand-building evidence for online advertising to a setting with observed offline purchase incidence and segment-level heterogeneity (recent vs nonrecent online consumers). It uses the cited paper as a key benchmark for positioning what is newly added.
